issue_summary: "PowellOptimizer": Added a constructor for setting of the absolute tolerance removed one redundant function evaluation. Line search relative tolerance explicitly set in the optimizer instance created in "PowellOptimizerTest".
javadoc_before:
/**
     * Constructor using the default line search tolerance (see the
     * {@link #PowellOptimizer(double) other constructor}).
     */
javadoc_after:
/**
     * Constructor with default line search tolerances (see the
     * {@link #PowellOptimizer(double,double) other constructor}).
     */
